diagrams.title: Linear Queue Operations
diagrams.description: Shows how elements are added at rear and removed from front in a linear queue
diagrams.purpose: Understand FIFO principle and pointer movement in queue operations

diagrams.title: Circular Queue State Diagram
diagrams.description: Depicts circular queue with front and rear pointers wrapping around the array
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how circular queue reuses space and handles wraparound using modulo arithmetic

diagrams.title: Queue vs Stack Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing LIFO (stack) vs FIFO (queue) behavior
elements: Visual: People in line vs Plates in stack
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between stack and queue ordering principles
